title: Create IMAGE-belongs-to-node Relationship
user_story:
As an API contributor\
I want to be able to attach IMAGES to all kinds of nodes\
So I can create a visual representation of those nodes
description:
* the relationship is successfully created when provided with valid data → status code `201`
* the relationship is not created when the provided data was not valid
  * `image` and/or `partner_node` not found → status code `404`
  * `images` cannot be attached to themselves → `422`
  * `images` cannot be attached to other `images` → `422`
* the user can trigger the creation of the same relationship over and over again
  * the result is always the same (idempotency)
  * however this is achieved in the code resp. the database, the `More Cars ID` needs to stay the same
* each `image` can be attached to multiple `nodes` of the *same *type 
  * e.g. two brands can have the same image
* each `image` can be attached to multiple `nodes` of *different *types 
  * e.g. a brand and a car model can have the same image
